title: Moroccan Masarepa Dumplings
description: A light and snappy Moroccan dish featuring yellow masarepa, these dumplings are fatty and flavorful, perfect for a gluten-free friendly meal. They are made with a combination of masarepa, spices, and herbs.
instructions: Combine the yellow masarepa, chicken broth, olive oil, ground cumin, smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper in a large bowl.
Mix the ingredients together until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5 minutes until it is smooth and pliable.
Divide the dough into small balls, about 1 inch in diameter.
Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and gently add the dumplings.
Cook the dumplings for 10 minutes, or until they float to the surface.
Remove the dumplings from the water with a slotted spoon and drain off any excess water.
Serve the dumplings hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley and a squeeze of lemon juice.
